title: Meet the Emirati stunt performer behind the action in 'Dune: Part Three'
summary_full: Emirati stunt performer Mohammed F. Mostafa is featured in the upcoming Dune: Part Three film.  He expresses pride in representing the UAE's unique desert environment and local talent.  Abu Dhabi's Liwa Desert has become a key filming location for the acclaimed science-fiction franchise.  This production highlights Abu Dhabi's growing role as an international filmmaking destination.  The film's success demonstrates the UAE's increasing contribution to global cinema.
